data.narrative: Alexandre is a 22-year-old male working as a service or sales worker. They have vocational or technical level education and very good health. They live as: single parent. They rely on public transport or walking.

encounters.contact_narrative: Hugo is a 27-year-old male working as a technician or associate professional. They have master or above level education and fair health. They live as: couple with children. They own a car.
